case_title: EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. PHILIPPE BEAUDETTE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEAUDETTE, PHILIPPE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT-ISSUE. $3,267.00 RENT, $470.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $480.00 COSTS, $1,933.20 HOLDOVER CHARGES, $6,097.97 CREDIT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $52.23, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
